overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European town. The character moves from a narrow courtyard through gates and cobblestone streets into a bustling market square, passing half-timbered buildings and stone architecture under clear sunny skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow courtyard with brick walls and large wooden gate

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through a narrow courtyard toward a large wooden gate, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: tall red brick wall with weathered stone foundation and some greenery growing on it
large double wooden doors with iron hinges and decorative metalwork, set in a stone archway
rough stone wall with small windows and wooden shutters
broken wooden crates, barrels, and rubble scattered on the cobblestone ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed courtyard with high brick and stone walls. Geralt walks forward on cobblestones toward a large wooden gate ahead. The area is quiet and empty, with debris scattered on the ground and patches of grass growing between stones.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with market stalls and historic buildings

events.description: passing through the dark wooden gate into a bright sunlit town square
emerging from shadow into direct sunlight, revealing colorful market stalls

agents.ego_description: Geralt steps through the gate into the open square, continuing to walk forward as the environment opens up

entered.detail: wide open cobblestone plaza with multiple paths leading between buildings
market tents with red and white striped canvas canopies
traditional medieval half-timbered houses with white plaster and dark wooden beams
stone fountain structure with steps on the left side of the square

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the large wooden gate into a bright sunlit town square. The scene opens up to reveal cobblestone plazas, colorful market stalls with red and white tents, and historic half-timbered buildings. The lighting shifts dramatically from shadow to bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street between stone and timber buildings

events.description: slight turn to the right while continuing down the street toward narrower section

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking down the cobblestone street, passing between tall historic buildings and approaching a narrower section with overhead structures

notable_agents.action: townsperson in yellow tunic walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall stone building with arched windows and decorative stonework
wooden beams and planks forming a overhead walkway or support structure between buildings
red fabric banners hanging from building facades

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues down a cobblestone street lined with stone and half-timbered buildings. The street narrows as he approaches wooden scaffolding overhead. A few NPCs walk in the opposite direction, and red banners hang from the buildings on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street with wooden overhead scaffolding and timber-framed buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking under wooden scaffolding that crosses overhead between buildings, continuing through the narrow passage

notable_agents.action: figure standing on the wooden scaffolding overhead looking down

entered.detail: close-up view of timber-framed building with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls
stone archway at the end of the narrow passage leading to brighter area beyond

segments.scene_description: The passage narrows further with wooden scaffolding overhead connecting the buildings. Geralt walks beneath the structure where a figure stands on the walkway above. The street is shaded and enclosed, with timber-framed buildings close on both sides and a stone archway visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market area with canvas tents and temporary stalls

events.description: passing through stone archway from narrow street into open market area
ground surface changes from cobblestone to dirt and grass as entering market field

agents.ego_description: Geralt emerges from the archway into a bustling open market, walking past tents and stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside a wooden cart with goods

entered.detail: large canvas market tents with wooden poles and various goods displayed underneath
wooden market stalls with stairs and platforms on the left side
areas of grass and dirt mixed with cobblestones in the market field

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the stone archway into a wide open market area. The ground changes from cobblestone to dirt and grass. Canvas tents and wooden stalls line the area, with NPCs browsing goods. The space is bright and open compared to the previous narrow passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy market square approaching stone bridge with birch trees

events.description: slight turn to the left while approaching the stone bridge structure

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the crowded market, passing various NPCs and stalls while approaching a stone bridge with stairs

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking alongside the path
man sitting on the ground near a wooden fence

entered.detail: stone bridge with multiple arches and a staircase leading up to it
tall white birch trees with green foliage lining the path
simple wooden picket fence along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt walking through a busy market area with moderate crowds of NPCs. He passes birch trees and wooden fences while approaching a large stone bridge with arches. The environment is lively with people walking and browsing, transitioning from the market tents toward the stone bridge structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, shadowed courtyard into a sprawling, sun-drenched medieval market. It begins in a quiet enclosed space with high brick walls and scattered debris, moving forward as Geralt passes through a large wooden gate that triggers a dramatic shift from shadow into bright sunlight. The scene then transitions through a narrowing cobblestone street lined with half-timbered buildings and red banners, passing beneath heavy wooden scaffolding and a stone archway that briefly constricts the view. As the camera emerges from the arch, the environment opens up into a wide market area where the ground shifts to dirt and grass among canvas tents and browsing NPCs. Finally, the path leads through a lively crowd and past birch trees, moving away from the stalls toward a large, arched stone bridge.
